chats.title: Chats
chats.noChats: You don't have any chats yet
chats.noChatsDescription: Chats will appear here after they are created

infoBanner.title: 📬 Your agent chats will appear here
infoBanner.description: When you run an agent with the create_session: true parameter, a chat session with full conversation history and statistics will appear here.

chats.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete the session and all messages. This action cannot be undone.

executions.title: Executions
executions.noExecutions: You don't have any executions yet
executions.noExecutionsDescription: Agent execution history will appear here

infoBanner.title: 🚀 Your agent executions will appear here
infoBanner.description: Each run of a published agent creates a record in the execution history. You'll see execution details, tokens used, cost, and results.

executionViewer.title: Execution Viewer
executionViewer.noChanges: This node made no state changes
executionViewer.loadingErrorDescription: Failed to load execution data. It may have been deleted or you may not have access.

organization.enterProjectName: Enter a name for the new project
organization.onlyOwnerCanEdit: Only owner can change organization name

addMemberModal.title: Add Member

addMemberModal.isOwnerDescription: Owners can add and remove members
addMemberModal.userNotFound: User with this email not found
addMemberModal.userAlreadyMember: User is already a member of the organization

removeMemberModal.title: Remove member?

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Color palette used in the system

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Channels that receive alerts about technical workflow execution failures. Applies to all workflows in the project.
notifications.name: Name

start.title: Start
start.firstPhraseHint: Assistant greeting added to the history as the first message when a new session starts.
start.firstPhrasePlaceholder: Hi! How can I help you?
start.projectVariablesNote: These variables are defined at the project level and available in all workflows

end.title: End
end.sessionEndDescription: The session will become inactive. Use as an indicator of dialog completion.
end.isErrorDescription: Mark completion as deliberate agent refusal (ERROR status instead of COMPLETED)
end.invalidJSON: ⚠️ Invalid JSON. Must be an object.
end.propertiesHelp: Enter a JSON object with additional properties for the end node

agent.title: Agent
agent.name: Name
agent.enforceTimeoutOnLastTooltip: When enabled, the per-call timeout also applies to the last model in the chain, so no single provider can hang the run. When disabled, the last model may run up to the overall timeout as a last resort.
agent.fallbackModelsHint: Tried in order when the main model keeps failing with transient errors (rate limits, 5xx).
agent.schemaDescription: Create JSON response structure for LLM model
agent.includeChatHistoryTooltip: When enabled, the full session dialogue history will be sent to the LLM. When disabled, only the node instructions and the current user message will be sent
agent.saveToHistoryTooltip: When enabled, this agent's answer is added to the run's shared dialogue history that later agents see. Disable to make the agent silent — its answer still flows to the next node and the final output, just not into the shared history.
agent.historyFieldTooltip: When the answer is JSON, save only this schema field to the shared history instead of the whole JSON. The full answer still flows downstream and to the final output.
agent.modelSettingsTooltip: Advanced LLM call parameters: temperature, penalties, response format, reasoning, and other model-dependent options
agent.modelSettingsModalDescription: Fine-tune LLM call parameters. Available fields depend on the selected model.

debug.title: Debug Chat
debug.clearHistory: Clear history and start new session
debug.noMessagesHelp: Enter a message below and run the workflow
debug.inputPlaceholder: For example: Hello! How are you?
debug.sessionClosedDesc: Agent closed the session. You can continue or start a new session

stateVariables.noVariablesText: No variables. Add your first variable.
stateVariables.noAvailableVariables: No available variables. Create the first variable.

workflowActions.moveDescription: Select the project to move the agent to

publishSuccess.apiKeyAutoCreated: We created an API key for this integration — save it now, it won't be shown again.

clientSessions.subtitle: Manage client data and session history

clientSessions.noChatSessions: No chat sessions for this client

projectSettings.title: Project Settings
projectSettings.subtitle: Manage project configuration and state schema
projectSettings.stateSchemaDescription: Securely store API keys, secrets, and client state. Pass client_id to access shared data across all agents in the project.
projectSettings.noVariablesDescription: Create variables to store API keys, secrets, and client state. Use client_id to share data between agents.
projectSettings.duplicateName: Variable with this name already exists
projectSettings.deleteVariableWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this variable? This may affect workflows that use it.

sidebar.title: Your Builder
sidebar.description: Drag blocks onto the canvas to build your agent's logic. Start with an agent node — it handles LLM communication

agentNode.title: AI Agent — The Heart of Your Workflow
agentNode.description: Drag this block onto the canvas — it becomes the brain of your agent. Uses LLM to understand requests and generate responses. Works out of the box with our system keys — just start testing!

debug.title: Test on the fly
debug.description: Hit Play and test your agent right now. You already have starter credits — send messages and watch how the agent thinks and responds at each step

credits.title: Credits & Savings
credits.description: Every agent run consumes credits from your balance. Want to spend less? Connect your own API keys from OpenAI, DeepSeek, or other providers — then only 1 credit per request instead of LLM call cost. Available on PRO and BUSINESS plans

publish.title: Ready for production?
publish.description: When your agent is ready — publish it. After that, you can call it via API from any application

final.title: Great! Let's test it
final.description: The debug chat will open automatically. Send a message and see your agent in action. You already have starter credits!

section.title: Billing & Usage
section.subtitle: Manage your billing plan and track resource usage

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: Select a plan that fits your project needs
pricing.unlimitedRequestsDesc: 0 credits when using your own API keys
pricing.ownApiKeysDesc: Use your own LLM provider keys
pricing.projectVariablesDesc: Store secrets and client state with client_id
pricing.note: Contact us to upgrade to a paid plan or get an enterprise solution

projectVariables.name: Project variables
projectVariables.description: Store API keys, secrets, and client state. Pass client_id — and all agents get access to shared data without losing context between conversations.

errors.agentsLimitReachedHint: You've hit your agent limit on the current plan. Upgrade to PRO or BUSINESS — get more agents, unlimited requests, and project variables for complex scenarios.
errors.creditsInsfficientHint: Connect your own API keys (PRO+ plan) and pay just 1 credit per request. Or upgrade to a plan with more credits.
errors.featureNotAvailable: This feature is not available on your current plan
errors.rateLimitHint: You have exceeded the limit of {{rpm}} requests per minute. Slow down requests or upgrade your plan.

meta.title: Assemblix - Visual AI Agent Builder
meta.description: Build smart AI agents without code using the Assemblix visual builder. Automate business processes, create chatbots and workflows.
meta.keywords: AI agents, agent builder, visual editor, workflow builder, automation, chatbots, artificial intelligence, no-code, low-code, Assemblix
